Introducing the WS2812B LED Pixel Ring Modules, a versatile and eye-catching illumination solution perfect for DIY projects, decorative lighting, and more. These addressable LED modules feature the advanced WS2812B integrated circuit, allowing for precise control over each individual LED’s colour and brightness. Available in various sizes ranging from 8 to 24 LEDs, these rings are designed to fit a wide range of applications. The RGB full-colour LEDs offer a vibrant and dynamic display, capable of producing millions of colour combinations. With an operating voltage of 5V DC, these modules seamlessly integrate with Arduino microcontrollers and compatible development platforms. The included Arduino library simplifies programming and control, enabling you to create mesmerising lighting effects and animations. Constructed with a durable black PCB, these LED rings are built to withstand regular use. Enhance your projects with the captivating glow of the WS2812B LED Pixel Ring Modules and unleash your creativity.
